rules.description: A person matches a search query if ANY non-empty search field matches the corresponding person attribute. Matching is case-insensitive substring match for string fields; equality for ZIP code.
rules.concern: Absence of all search fields returns no results (no guard for empty form), but one empty field incorrectly matches everything for that field because the OR is short-circuit: `this.formdata.last && element.name.toLowerCase().indexOf(...)`. When formdata.last is falsy, that sub-condition is false, so unintended matches do NOT occur — but the logic is fragile and hard to audit.

rules.description: A user must select a person result first, then optionally select one of that person's Zahlungsempfaenger (payment recipient) entries. Only the latest selected IBAN/BIC is sent to ALLEGRO.
rules.concern: No validation that a Zahlungsempfaenger is selected before clicking 'Nach ALLEGRO übernehmen'. If not selected, the raw string zahlungsempfaenger_selected = '' is sent.

rules.description: WebSocket messages carry a 'target' field with values 'textfield' or 'textarea'. The Swing client routes the message content accordingly: 'textfield' populates the person/payment form fields; 'textarea' sets the raw text area.
rules.concern: Unknown target values are silently ignored — no default case or error feedback.

rules.description: The WebSocket server re-broadcasts every received message to ALL connected clients, including the original sender.
rules.concern: The sender receives its own message back — could cause unintended loops if the Vue client reacts to incoming messages.

rules.description: Every keystroke in a text field immediately updates the corresponding ValueModel entry via DocumentListener (insertUpdate / removeUpdate).
rules.concern: changedUpdate is empty — style/attribute changes to the document are not captured.

rules.description: After the HTTP POST action completes (whether successful or failed), all text fields are cleared and the 'female' radio button is re-selected.
rules.concern: The reset is triggered by any non-empty response, including error responses — users lose data even on failure.

rules.description: HttpBinService response is considered a failure only if responseBody is empty. An HTTP 4xx/5xx with a non-empty body is treated as success.
rules.concern: HTTP status code is logged to console but NOT used for pass/fail logic. This is a correctness bug.

rules.description: Every change to the Vue textarea immediately sends a WebSocket message with target='textarea' to all connected Swing clients.
rules.concern: Sends before socket is confirmed open. If sendMessage is called before connect() establishes the connection, an unhandled exception will be thrown.

workflows.name: Person Search and Transfer to ALLEGRO
steps: 1. User fills one or more search fields in Vue web client
2. User clicks 'Suchen' — searchPerson() filters local search_space
3. Results displayed in table; user clicks a row to select a person
4. Zahlungsempfaenger sub-table populates; user optionally selects a payment entry
6. sendMessage() serializes selected person + payment data as JSON, sends to WebSocket server
7. Server broadcasts message to all clients
8. Swing client onMessage() receives JSON, routes to 'textfield' case
9. toSearchResult() parses JSON and populates all text fields

workflows.name: MVP Form Submission (com.poc package)
steps: 1. User fills form fields — each keystroke updates PocModel via DocumentListener
4. PocModel collects all field values into a HashMap
7. PocPresenter listener receives event, resets all form fields
